name: COMPLIANCE-URLS: duplicate ids in COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml rejected at load
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: dup
  name: A
  url: https://a.gov
  authoritative_publisher: A
  jurisdiction: US Federal
  applicable_to: [s]
  identifier_scheme: x
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: true
  paywalled: false
  document_url: https://a.gov
  attribution_note: x
- id: dup
  name: B
  url: https://b.gov
  authoritative_publisher: B
  jurisdiction: US Federal
  applicable_to: [s]
  identifier_scheme: x
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: true
  paywalled: false
  document_url: https://b.gov
  attribution_note: x
" > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-compliance-urls.sh" "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml"
